assessment_method: Manual review of the machine-collected final-cache CLI rollout, exact setup-state prompt, changed-file inventory, implementation-path evidence, context metrics, and evaluation-isolation report.

context_trace.verifiable.evidence: The trace records the final-cache skill body, exactly one selected verification reference, and no evaluator-oracle access.

all_fixtures.skill_description_codepoint.evidence: The launch-time exclusion-first description measured 752 codepoints, below the 800-codepoint limit.

explicit_quick_standard_full.core_body_c.evidence: The loaded core body measured 1483 codepoints, below the 1500-codepoint limit.

standard.reference_codepoints.evidence: Only the verification selection was loaded at 2239 codepoints, below the 2500-codepoint standard limit.

standard.reference_h2_sections.evidence: The selected verification protocol contributed exactly 2 H2 sections.

governance_corpus.bulk_loaded.evidence: No governance corpus document or governance protocol was read.

notes: Only src/labels.py and tests/test_labels.py changed; all three adjacent test functions passed through the available standard-library runner because pytest was unavailable.
